prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-65PCDIECASTCARSET-PARENT Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio JUMBO SET 65pc Diecast Toy Cars Playset Toys for Boys, Ages 3 and Up (5 Styles) Description: Packed with detailed vehicles and equipped for adventure, Kidplokio’s themed diecast car playsets are designed to bring the thrill of imaginative and creative pretend play to your little ones playtime! Choose from Military, Police, Fire Rescue, Space and Construction!

Featuring sixty five individual pieces, this playset set features a variety of realistic diecast vehicles designed to bring the world of tactical operations, fire rescue missions, space exploration, construction site and law enforcement to life, all with awesome and vibrant inspired graphics. And, with no assembly required, kids can jump into playtime right out of the box!

These captivating diecast car playset gives young imaginations everything they need to create their own action packed playtime adventures. Kids will love using their imagination, while it encourages them to participate in screen free playtime with family and friends.

Built tough for endless playtime, these military themed diecast cars, trucks and accessories are sturdy, safe and ideal for active play. Designed with little hands in mind, this diecast cars playset is suitable for children ages three and up.

Search Terms: Stem toddler tactile sensory fine motor skills diecast cars gifts for boys birthday presents race car games pretend play toy vehicle playsets car accessories screen free activities for toddlers police space fire truck construction military toys Features: - 65PC DIECAST CARS PLAYSET: Let the adventure begin with these awesome themed diecast cars playsets! Choose from military, police, fire rescue, space exploration and construction; no assembly is required - DIECAST CARS: These captivating sets include 65 diecast cars and accessories, each designed with vibrant and inspired graphics! This playset includes cars, helicopters, rescue vehicles, accessories and much more - DURABLE AND SAFE: Built tough for endless playtime, these diecast cars and accessories are sturdy, safe and ideal for active play; designed with little hands in mind, this diecast cars playset is suitable for children ages three and up - TACTILE TOYS: Featuring a fleet of finely crafted diecast vehicles and accessories, little ones will have everything they need for a fun playtime setting; sparking curiosity about related fields, kids will love using their imagination, while it encourages them to participate in screen free playtime with friends and family - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18 x 14.5 x 2 inches; Weight: 1.62lbs; Note: No Assembly Required === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: Kidplokio 65-pc Jumbo Diecast Toy Cars Playset

anthropic.title_differentiation: 5 Themed Sets, 65 Vehicles And Accessories, Ages 3, No Assembly, Screen-Free Play

openai.title_differentiation: 5 Themed Styles, 65 Diecast Vehicles And Accessories, No Assembly Required, Ages 3 And Up, Screen Free Play
